name: ASO.dev
description: ASO.dev — multilingual app optimization platform for iOS developers with powerful localization tools, metadata management and App Store Connect integration via native Mac app.

seo.title: ASO.dev — App Growth Tooling (ASO)
seo.meta_description: ASO.dev: ASO.dev — multilingual app optimization platform for iOS developers with powerful localization tools, metadata management and App Store Connect integra

when_to_use: Managing App Store metadata in multiple languages via native Mac app
Syncing ASO changes directly to App Store Connect from desktop tool
Localizing app titles and descriptions for international market expansion
Maintaining metadata consistency across iOS app versions and locales

pros: Native Mac app with App Store Connect integration
cons: Smaller scope than web-based ASO suites
Community and content library still growing
review.verdict: Best native-feel ASO tool for iOS devs on macOS; cross-platform teams will outgrow it.
review.best_for: iOS-only developers on macOS doing heavy localization
review.not_for: Android teams or marketers who prefer web apps
